body.p: The Chemnitz Linux Days (CLT) are the largest Free Software conference in Germany. It is a long-standing event for education about Linux and Free Software. The event includes workshops, lectures and beginners' talks in the central building of the Chemnitz University of Technology.

The FSFE will be present at the CLT 2026 edition with an information booth and serveral talks a presentations On Sunday at 13:00, the FSFE's Technical Advisor Florian Snow will talk about "Lizenzierung freier Software: Was Entwickler wissen müssen" (room V4).
